title: cerothamnus cerifer
intro: Cerothamnus cerifer, also known as the 'fragrant lavender', is a type of flowering plant in the lavender family. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cerothamnus cerifer include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried flower, with the tea being a popular herbal preparation for its calming effects.
